summary: The test suite covers core matrix generation features (include/exclude, fail-fast, max-parallel, size validation) and basic error handling, but lacks depth in boundary conditions, edge cases, and error scenarios. Missing tests for invalid JSON, null/empty values, partial matching in rules, and workflow file validation. No test fixtures or helper functions reduce maintainability. Would catch major breakage but insufficient to prevent regressions in production. The suite also does not validate the required GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/environment-matrix-generator.yml) mentioned in the task requirements.
